assertion_results.text: The verification report marks all 5 acceptance criteria as PASS — the diff implements single license filter, comma-separated filter, 400 validation, pagination integration, and unchanged response shape
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 12 shows 'Acceptance Criteria | PASS | 5 of 5 criteria met'. The Acceptance Criteria Detail table (lines 21-25) lists all 5 criteria individually as PASS: (1) single license filter, (2) comma-separated filter, (3) 400 Bad Request for invalid license, (4) pagination integration, (5) unchanged response shape. Each criterion file (criterion-1.md through criterion-5.md) also marks its result as PASS.

assertion_results.text: Scope containment is PASS — all files in the diff (list.rs, service/mod.rs, tests/api/package.rs) are listed in the task's Files to Modify or Files to Create
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 7 shows 'Scope Containment | PASS | All 3 changed files match the task specification exactly: 2 files modified (`list.rs`, `service/mod.rs`) and 1 file created (`tests/api/package.rs`)'. The three files match exactly what the assertion specifies.

assertion_results.text: No sub-tasks are created because there are no review comments (Review Feedback is N/A)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 5 shows 'Review Feedback | N/A | No reviews or comments exist on the PR'. Line 6 shows 'Root-Cause Investigation | N/A | No sub-tasks were created; nothing to investigate'. No sub-tasks were created and Review Feedback is explicitly N/A.

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT modify any code files — it only reads, verifies, and reports (constraint 1.11)
assertion_results.evidence: The outputs directory contains only report files: report.md, criterion-1.md through criterion-5.md. All output files are verification/analysis documents describing what was read from the diff. None of the outputs contain code modifications, patch files, or any indication that source files were edited. The report discusses code excerpts in read-only analysis context only (quoting diff content for verification purposes).

assertion_results.text: The report does NOT auto-merge the PR — it presents findings for human review (constraint 1.13)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md concludes with 'All checks pass. The implementation correctly adds a license filter...' followed by '*This comment was AI-generated by [sdlc-workflow/verify-pr]...*'. The report presents findings and conclusions but does not invoke any merge action, does not call 'gh pr merge', and does not state that the PR was merged. It presents the verification results for human review.

assertion_results.text: Sensitive pattern scan is PASS — the diff contains no passwords, API keys, or private keys
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 10 shows 'Sensitive Patterns | PASS | No passwords, secrets, API keys, private keys, or .env references found in the diff'.

assertion_results.text: The report contains a Test Change Classification row with ADDITIVE — only new test files were added (tests/api/package.rs is a new file)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 14 shows 'Test Change Classification | ADDITIVE | 1 new test file (`tests/api/package.rs`) with 4 test functions; no modified or deleted test files'. This matches the assertion exactly — the classification is ADDITIVE and identifies tests/api/package.rs as a new file.
